author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Plan: arm64 musl cross-compile failed in CI as predicted in the audit. Concrete error: liblibsqlite3_sys (built from sqlite3.c via the build script) emits glibc-only symbols (open64/stat64/fstat64/ftruncate64/fcntl64/pread64/pwrite64/mmap64/lstat64 — Large File Support; __memcpy_chk/__memset_chk/__memmove_chk — _FORTIFY_SOURCE) because gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu is a glibc cross-compiler. The musl libc has none of those, so ld fails with 'undefined reference'. Fix: switch the arm64 leg to cross-rs/cross which runs cargo inside a docker image carrying a proper aarch64-musl toolchain. Keep amd64 native (musl-tools work fine — only the cross direction needs cross-rs). Install via taiki-e/install-action (fast — fetches prebuilt binary instead of cargo install). Single workflow file edit. Commit on the same branch.
